name: Scallops Provencal
recipeIngredient: 2 LARGE RIPE TOMATOES (PEELLED AND COarsely CHOPPED)
recipeInstructions:
1. COMBINE OLIVE OIL, GARLIC, and ONION in a 2-quart microwave-proof casserole.
2. MICROWAVE on HIGH for 30 SECONDS.
3. IF USING SEA SCALLOPS, QUARTER THEM.
4. ADD SCALLOPS to the casserole and STIR to coat.
5. STIR IN TOMATOES, MUSHROOMS, PARSLEY, OLIVES, and PEPPER to taste.
6. COVER with wax paper and MICROWAVE on MEDIUM for 3 MINUTES, STIRRING.
7. COVER AGAIN and MICROWAVE for 2-4 MINUTES or until SCALLOPS are OPAQUE and COOKED THROUGH.
8. TO SERVE, SPLASH INTO INDIVIDUAL SERVING BOWLS and SPRINKLE with REMAINING BASIL. MAKES FOUR SERVINGS.
